description: PRD-001 — Completar módulo de autenticação: verificação email, password reset, rate limiting, logout-all

userStories.title: Adicionar rate limiting no login
userStories.description: As a security-conscious developer, I need rate limiting on the login endpoint to prevent brute force attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: Configure RateLimiter for login: max 5 attempts per 15 minutes per IP+email combination
Apply throttle middleware to POST /login route
Return 429 status with Retry-After header when limit exceeded
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use Laravel RateLimiter in AppServiceProvider or RouteServiceProvider.

userStories.title: Implementar logout de todos os dispositivos
userStories.description: As a user, I want to logout from all devices at once for security.
acceptanceCriteria: Add POST /auth/logout-all route in api.php (authenticated)
Implement method that revokes all personal_access_tokens for the user
Return 200 with count of sessions terminated
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: AuthController already has logout(). Add logoutAll() method.

userStories.title: Implementar alteração de senha
userStories.description: As an authenticated user, I want to change my password by providing my current password.
acceptanceCriteria: Add PUT /auth/password route in api.php (authenticated)
Validate current_password matches before accepting new password
New password: min 8 chars, must contain letters and numbers
Revoke all tokens except current after password change
Return 200 with success message
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implementar recuperação de senha (forgot + reset)
userStories.description: As a user who forgot my password, I want to reset it via email link.
acceptanceCriteria: Add POST /auth/forgot-password route (public) — sends reset link email
Add POST /auth/reset-password route (public) — applies new password with token
Token expires after 1 hour, single use
Always return 200 on forgot-password regardless of email existence (prevent enumeration)
After reset, revoke all user tokens
Use Laravel Password broker (Password::sendResetLink)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: password_reset_tokens table already exists in migrations.

userStories.title: Implementar verificação de e-mail
userStories.description: As a platform operator, I need users to verify their email to ensure valid accounts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add MustVerifyEmail interface to User model
Add POST /auth/verify-email route — validates verification token
Add POST /auth/resend-verification route — resends verification email
Send verification email on registration
Unverified users receive 403 on protected endpoints (except verify/resend)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use Laravel built-in email verification. Be careful not to break existing login flow.

userStories.title: Adicionar rate limiting global na API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need global rate limiting on all API endpoints for security and stability.
acceptanceCriteria: Configure global API rate limiter: 60 requests/minute per user (or IP if unauthenticated)
Configure specific limits: register 3/hour per IP, AI generation 5/hour per user
Apply to route groups in api.php
Return 429 with proper headers when exceeded
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: leaderboard throttle already exists in api.php. Extend the pattern.
